summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Les 48 Lois du Pouvoir educational game completed successfully. All core features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: Home screen loads correctly with title 'Les 48 Lois du Pouvoir'
Session size selector works (10/15/20 buttons change selection correctly)
Starting a game session navigates to /session and shows question card
Question cards display type badge, question text, and 4 multiple choice options
Answering correctly shows green feedback panel with 'Correct' message and explanation
Answering incorrectly shows red feedback panel with 'Incorrect' message, correct law title, correct explanation, AND specific explanation of why user's choice was wrong
Clicking 'Continuer' advances to the next question card
Progress counter (X/Y) updates correctly as questions are answered
Spaced repetition system works - when answering wrong, total increases (10→11→12→13)
Navigation to /progress shows ProgressScreen with stats and overall progress bar
'Quitter' button on game session navigates back to home
'Reviser mes erreurs' button is properly disabled when there are no errors
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Dark elegant UI with gold accents displays correctly
French language content displays properly throughout the app
localStorage persistence works (progress tracking between sessions)
